title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
